narrative:
Marion Township has 3,489 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.2 percentage points.
